'''âw-n-l-sh''' ('''kawanleshoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:longboard|longboard]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-n-l-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:longboard|longboard]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âw-n-l-sh
|-
! Lemma
| kawanleshoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiwanleshoko|thiwanleshoko]] || [[word:jiwanleshoko|jiwanleshoko]] || [[word:shiwanleshoko|shiwanleshoko]] || [[word:kiwanleshoko|kiwanleshoko]]
|-

|-

|-
